result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d aim to eradicate extreme poverty and ensure that everyone has access to basic necessities—clean water, nutritious food, decent shelter, health care, and education. When those fundamental needs are met, people gain the freedom and opportunity to pursue their own potentials, build resilient communities, and contribute to a more stable, compassionate world. It’s a change that, once achieved, would ripple out into countless other improvements in health, peace, and overall well‑being.
